case_title: OTIS LEVAN LLOYD JR. VS. MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, A FLORIDA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LLOYD JR., OTIS LEVAN AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES, A FLORIDA CORPORATION MODERN INDUSTRIAL SERVICES OF FORT MYERS, INC., A FLORIDA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
